notes: Rectangles are semantic edit bounds; the binary UV mask remains the exact write boundary.
Left front/hind legs share one island and right front/hind legs share another.

regions.label: Head and face
regions.prompt_role: Orange head, cream cheeks and blaze, paired dark eyes.

regions.label: Ears
regions.prompt_role: Dark ear tips with small warm inner-ear accents.

regions.label: Muzzle and nose
regions.prompt_role: Cream muzzle with a restrained two-pixel dark nose.

regions.label: Torso end caps
regions.prompt_role: Orange torso end caps with hard face shading.

regions.label: Torso sides
regions.prompt_role: Orange torso sides with a cream underside.

regions.label: Legs and paws
regions.prompt_role: Orange legs terminating in dark paws.

regions.label: Tail
regions.prompt_role: Orange tail with an irregular cream tip transition.
